PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?opponent ?opponentLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q9514606 wdt:P26 ?game .
  ?game rdfs:label ?gameLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?gameLabel) = "en")
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?gameLabel) , "rose bowl"))
  ?game wdt:P26 ?opponent .
  FILTER(?opponent != wd:Q9514606)
  .
  ?opponent rdfs:label ?opponentLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?opponentLabel) = "en")
}
